channel.title: Trustee Board meeting summaries on 1st Anytown Scouts
channel.description: Recent content in Trustee Board meeting summaries on 1st Anytown Scouts

item.title: Annual General Meeting — May 2025
item.description:
At the Annual General Meeting on 13 May 2025, members:

  • received the Trustees’ Annual Report and accounts for the year;
  • elected the Trustee Board for the coming year, including a new Treasurer;
  • thanked outgoing volunteers and welcomed new leaders.

The full minutes and accounts are published in our reports archive.

item.title: Trustee Board — March 2026
item.description:
At its meeting on 12 March 2026, the Trustee Board:

  • approved the budget for the 2026–27 year, holding subs at the current level after reviewing reserves;
  • agreed to apply for a local-authority grant towards replacing the camping equipment store;
  • reviewed the risk register, with no high-severity risks outstanding;
  • received the Lead Volunteer’s report — all sections are running, with a short waiting list for Beavers;
  • confirmed the date of the Annual General Meeting (see the governance page).

Detailed finances are published each year in our Trustees’ Annual Report.

item.title: Trustee Board — November 2025
item.description:
At its meeting on 18 November 2025, the Trustee Board:

  • adopted the updated safeguarding and safety reporting routine as a standing item at every meeting;
  • approved spending on a winter-camp minibus hire after reviewing two quotes;
  • agreed the recruitment plan for an additional Cubs leader and a treasurer’s assistant;
  • noted that all volunteers were up to date with mandatory learning and disclosure checks.
